programme.title: British Touring Car Championship Highlights
programme.desc: Steve Rider presents action from rounds seven, eight and nine of the British Touring Car Championship from Brands Hatch. Commentary from David Addison and Tim Harvey, with reports by Louise Goodman.

programme.title: ITV Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service.

programme.title: FYI Extra
programme.desc: Short bulletin rounding up the day's showbusiness stories.

programme.title: Winning Combination
programme.desc: Quiz, hosted by Omid Djalili, in which contestants Jess, Harry, Martin, Punita, Andy, Kate, Helen, Terry and Lee are assigned a number between one and nine. They are then whittled down to a final four, and the combination of numbers they are assigned represents the size of the jackpot they play to win in a final round.

programme.title: ITV Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Game show, hosted by Ben Shephard, in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot.

programme.title: Hottest In The World Right Now
programme.desc: Stay tuned for the hottest tracks from some of the biggest and freshest Kiss artists right now.

programme.title: Up All Night! Kiss Beats
programme.desc: Let Kiss keep you up all night with the finest collection of RandB tunes and nocturnal beats.

programme.title: News, Sport, Weather
programme.desc: Round-up of the latest news and sports headlines, plus weather forecasts.

programme.title: News, Sport, Weather
programme.desc: Round-up of the latest news and sports headlines, plus weather forecasts.

programme.title: Sky News
programme.desc: A summary of the latest news headlines.

programme.title: Sky News
programme.desc: A summary of the latest news headlines.

programme.title: Sky News on the Hour
programme.desc: Review of the latest international news, with sport, weather and financial updates.

programme.title: Sky News on the Hour
programme.desc: Review of the latest international news, with sport, weather and financial updates.

programme.title: Sky News
programme.desc: A summary of the latest news headlines.

programme.title: Sky News
programme.desc: A summary of the latest news headlines.

programme.title: Sky News
programme.desc: A summary of the latest news headlines.

programme.title: Sky News
programme.desc: A summary of the latest news headlines.

programme.title: Sky News
programme.desc: A summary of the latest news headlines.

programme.title: Press Preview
programme.desc: A preview of the stories appearing in tomorrow's national newspapers.

programme.title: All The Hits, All Night
programme.desc: Non-stop hits to see you all the way through the night.

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: Rene uses strange means to establish essential radio contact with England, while Herr Flick suspects the Colonel and General are plotting an assassination attempt. Comedy, starring Gorden Kaye and Richard Gibson.

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: Gruber finishes the paintings and the spy camera sent from London has fallen into a vineyard where the peasants are refusing to work for fear of being shot.

programme.title: Underground Worlds
programme.desc: Incredible feats of human endeavour, revealing what people have built, where they've built it, how and why. The first edition explores deep inside the rock on Gibraltar where there's over 55km complex of tunnels, under London, where 21st-century engineering innovation is paving the way for the ultimate super sewer and continues the legacy of Victorian pioneers and reveals the extraordinary subterranean space of one of Europe's largest and most breath-taking natural cave systems - The Postojna Cave in Slovenia.

programme.title: Underground Worlds
programme.desc: A look at Sweden's passion for subterranean spaces and how this nation has taken extraordinary precautions to protect itself - by excavating an astounding 65,000 nuclear bunkers. In south-west England, deep in the Mendip Hills of Somerset, lies one of the most spectacular landscapes in the UK, but beneath this breath-taking landscape sits secret caverns and magical rock formations carved out by nature. Plus, how in Romania, nside a 1.2km-thick layer of salt, sits a world underground first.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: Zak Bagans, Nick Groff and Aaron Goodwin head for Kansas, where they hope to contact the spirits of those killed in the Union Station massacre of 1933.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: Adam, Amy and Chip investigate strange symbols etched on the walls of an Indiana asylum. Are the symbols responsible for paranormal activity in the building?.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees
programme.desc: The team members find themselves in a dangerous situation when they attempt to rescue dogs involved in a dog-fighting ring. And, for one lucky pit bull, a new home awaits.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees
programme.desc: A dangerously ill dog is rescued from the streets of New Orleans by Tania and Tia. Meanwhile, pitbull Chong takes a turn for the worse as his cancerous tumour grows.

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Host Dara O Briain and regulars Hugh Dennis and Andy Parsons are joined by Ed Byrne, Milton Jones, Russell Kane and Zoe Lyons on the comedy quiz. The panellists give their take on the major news stories from July 2014 and participate in a series of stand-up spots and improvised games.

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by Radio 1 DJ Clara Amfo, actor Tom Davis, actor and musician Shaun Ryder and comedian Henning Wehn, aiming to deceive their opponents with plausible lies. Hosted by Rob Brydon.

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Stephen Fry is joined by comedians Dara O Briain, Chris Addison, Sean Lock and regular panellist Alan Davies on the quiz with a difference. The host asks questions about things that are horrible, awarding points for the answers he finds the most interesting.

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig hosts the quiz with a difference, in which the questions are so difficult points are awarded for the answers she finds most interesting. The show has reached the letter R, and a rather Rude episode. Joining Sandi are John Barrowman, Phill Jupitus, Aisling Bea and regular panellist Alan Davies.

programme.title: Rhod Gilbert's Work Experience
programme.desc: Rhod thinks he has a great chance of becoming a model - after all, he was voted Wales' 14th sexiest man. However, his dreams of strutting along catwalks in Milan and Paris are shattered by unimpressed fashion guru Julien Macdonald, so he has to lower his expectations somewhat, taking him into parts of the industry he never knew existed. He strips off for a room full of budding artists, meets a woman whose hands are her fortune, and signs up with an agency that focuses on 'character' rather than good looks. Can he make it or must he face the brutal truth?.

programme.title: Eat Your Heart Out with Nick Helm
programme.desc: Nick samples a vegan street food platter with Rhod Gilbert, before visiting a Willy Wonka style sweet shop.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: The Kilchers go fishing, and they need to catch hundreds of pounds of fish for them to eat and barter with during the winter months.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL
programme.desc: In a 24-hour period, the contaminated fruit of a single tree triggers a shocking chain of events. As panic and illness spread, there is doubt that anyone will make it to day 40

programme.title: Kindig Customs
programme.desc: Dave Kindig and his team return to develop more one-of-a-kind vehicles for demanding clients. They begin by giving a 1957 Ford Fairline a much-needed facelift.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Born Survivor
programme.desc: The adventurer demonstrates how to survive in Ecuador's jungles, building bamboo bridges, making a bow and arrow and revealing which plants are poisonous.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: The Imaginarium Science Centre requests a giant ship-shaped tank with a replica of the USCGC Mohawk ship inside, which proves to be an ocean-sized headache for the brothers-in-law.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs
programme.desc: Mike, Robert and Ted remove a stock teletrade from a brokerage firm in downtown Roanoke, Virginia.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike Brewer finds a 2002 Chevy Corvette Z06 that can do zero to 60mph in under four seconds, but mechanic Ant Anstead is less than enthused when he realises the scale of the work needed.

programme.title: Goblin Works Garage
programme.desc: The gang transforms an iconic 1973 Ford Bronco into a monster truck with attitude. Plus, Ant builds a bike for his most important client: his daughter.

programme.title: American Chopper
programme.desc: The team works on the first-ever diesel-powered chopper, Paul Jr attends the opening of the dog park he has designed, and Mikey performs his stand-up routine to a packed house.

programme.title: Fantomworks
programme.desc: Jay brings Dan a 2012 Camaro ZL1 with poor performance and a blown supercharger. Plus, Terry brings in a high-powered restomod of a 1931 Landau Phaeton.

programme.title: Wings of War
programme.desc: A look at the F-22 Raptor fighter plane, a supersonic aircraft that dominates American airspace.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: The manufacture of car tyres, silk, art conservation and scuba tanks and how the processes have evolved.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Electric Stand-Up Vehicles/Frozen Fruit/Beer Coasters/Forged Door Handle
programme.desc: A look at how objects including electric stand-up vehicles, beer coasters and forged door handles are manufactured.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy samples everything from burgers to buns to bagels, visiting a deli that serves up lamb burgers and righteous ribs in Portsmouth, New Hampshire.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits Raymond, New Hampshire, and samples scratch-made corn dogs before heading to Rocky Hill, New Jersey to a 1700s inn-turned-gastropub.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri searches for food with flavour and has gingerbread pancakes in Austin, Chinese chicken wings in Minneapolis and duck enchiladas in Albuquerque.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri checks out fried bologna and veggie burgers in Louisville, and brunch staples at a diner-restaurant mash-up in Portland, Oregon.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri checks out some of the greatest carnivorous creations on the road, including a bomb butchery in Portland, Oregon, and a righteous barbecue joint in Kentucky.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri crosses the Atlantic to dive into the many different cuisines of Barcelona, sampling Galician-style octopus and soup, traditional sausage and old-school Catalan cooking.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home.

programme.title: Waking the Dead
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. A millionaire businessman is found dead a year after his disappearance. Evidence suggests he was imprisoned in a cellar immediately before his death, and it's not long before a second body is discovered at the scene. The other corpse has been dead for far longer - and it seems both murders could be the work of an unlikely suspect.

programme.title: Life on Mars
programme.desc: Sam and the rest of the CID unit get to work in an effort to prove Gene's innocence when he becomes a suspect in a murder case. But as the investigation continues, further evidence is stacked up against Hunt, leading to a conclusion that rocks the very foundations of the detective's already fragile world. John Simm and Philip Glenister star.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Rene and Casey return to the auctions only to be greeted by fierce competition. Dave finds a piece of board game history.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Darrell and Brandon have high hopes when they return to the site of one of their greatest triumphs, while the other bidders take on the self-proclaimed king of storage.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Ton Jones and Allen Haff try to make a profit by selling a 19th-century Colt Peacemaker pistol, a Depression-era slot machine and a customised mini-bike.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: The traders discover a valuable 1970s Fender Stratocaster guitar and a rare Schwinn bicycle from the 1930s.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Morgan gets a crash course in extreme winter flying, Marty battles a predator invasion, Tom faces a new wolf threat, while Jake and his hounds hunt a rogue lion.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: A bitter cold front sweeps over the swamp, threatening to shut down the season. Reality series following the lives of aligator hunters on America's largest swamp.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Family members bring in a pick-up truck to be restored in memory of their mother, and Danny needs to figure out how to create the tribute vehicle without exceeding the budget.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Ron and Tyler discover a rusty pump that could be worth a fortune if properly restored - but first they need to persuade the owner to part with it.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Rick and the team restore a gramophone from the 1920s and a 1915 cement gun that they discover was once put to a very different use.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The guys haggle over a First World War helmet and a holster from the TV series Gunsmoke, while Rick decides they need to get into shape.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The team members get their hands on an 1863 rifle that proved decisive in the American Civil War, and examine a fully restored 1915 Ford Model T taxi.

programme.title: Forensic Detectives
programme.desc: Detectives suspect arson upon investigating the raging fire that turned a couple's home into a death chamber. Plus, officers employ the services of a special type of sniffer dog to track down a missing target.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: The case of 24-year-old former cheerleader Amy Lord. CCTV footage from ATMs and outside her home captured the moment she was taken by her killer.

programme.title: Dr G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: High school football star Alonzo collapses with muscle pain and dies, and a young woman's bloodied body is found at home.

programme.title: FBI Files
programme.desc: The bloodiest gun battle in the FBI's history, which occurred on April 11, 1986, when agents attempted to apprehend two suspects responsible for a prolonged crime spree.

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: An investigator intervenes at a private animal shelter for 600 dogs, trying to persuade the owner she should reduce numbers in the pack.

programme.title: Bondi Vet: Coast to Coast
programme.desc: Dr Peter needs to remove a grass seed from a dog's eye. Dr Alex tries to fix a traumatised puppy that has been attacked and a massive dog comes in for a check-up.

programme.title: Curvy Brides Boutique
programme.desc: Behind the scenes at a wedding dress shop catering to larger customers.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Murder Files
programme.desc: Donal meets DI Jim Hodgson to discover how a woman's body found naked at the scene of a fire raised suspicions of murder and an attempted cover up.

programme.title: Encounters with Evil
programme.desc: Encounters with Evil brings you expert analysis and interviews with those closest to the cases to explore the minds of the perpetrators of the world's most notorious crimes.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Murder Files
programme.desc: Donal meets DI Jim Hodgson to discover how a woman's body found naked at the scene of a fire raised suspicions of murder and an attempted cover up.

programme.title: Encounters with Evil
programme.desc: Encounters with Evil brings you expert analysis and interviews with those closest to the cases to explore the minds of the perpetrators of the world's most notorious crimes.

programme.desc: Find out what's happening in the West Midlands today with all the latest local news, opinions and events.
